nodes.definition: A mix of discordant sounds; dissonance.
Characterized by exceptionally early development or maturity.
A chronological mistake; the erroneous dating of an event, circumstance, or object.
A ban or curse pronounced with religious solemnity by ecclesiastical authority, often accompanied by excommunication; something denounced as accursed. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
Agitation, publicity, public communication aimed at influencing an audience and furthering an agenda.
A swampy, soggy area of ground.
An event or enterprise that ends suddenly and disastrously, often with humiliating consequences. .mw-parser-output .defdate{font-size:smaller}
